_comment: ADOPTER EXAMPLE — one governed change (Loom 2.0 §4), mounted as docs/governance/changes/CHG-2026-0042/. The envelope is the traceability root: every sibling artifact carries this change_id. control-plan.json is COMPILED (node core/policy-compiler.mjs ... --write), never hand-written — the change-envelope gate recompiles and rejects a stale or edited plan.

classification.rationale: Material change to an existing retail credit product: new affordability model in the decision path, personal data in scope.
